contextEncoderAblation.verdict: With only 10 engines, the neural context encoder has too few tasks to learn a useful calibration prior. The closed-form Engine DNA (fit exactly per engine) is both more accurate and exactly interpretable at this data scale -- reported as a deliberate engineering choice, not a shortcut.

scenarios.label: Negative pressure reading
reasons: P2_Pa is non-positive or non-finite (-5000.00) -- physically impossible

scenarios.label: Stuck/frozen T3 sensor
reasons: T3 (219.4K) does not exceed T2 (239.4K) -- combustion must add heat; this reading violates a hard physical law

scenarios.label: Extreme T4 spike (15x)
reasons: eta_t_raw=-877.363 is outside the empirically observed plausible range [-7.55, 13.15] by 42x the normal span -- too extreme to be real degradation
